title: Rebuild Angel biology notes speculations
wikitext:
[]: [Rebuild] Angel "biology" notes/speculations             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Fri Dec 03, 2010 12:53 pm Here's a list of what I know about the Angels: • Angels are composed of exotic matter, described as "light energy condensed into a solid state." It is not actually photons, but somehow similar. (NGE Proposal, Episode 05) Speculation: Angels are composed of some sort of dark matter? Dark energy? Dark fluid? Neutrinos? • Elementary particles of this exotic matter are implied to consist of a set of Top, Bottom, and Strangeness quarks, in contrast to protons and neutrons. (Episode 23) • Spectrometric analysis of Angels returns the result "Characteristic Wave Pattern: Blood Type Blue." This has no connection to their actual blood, except TV series-version Sachiel and EVA-02, which have blue blood. Speculation: What is the relevance/meaning of this statement? Where does "Blood Type: Orange" fit? Applied to infector-type Angels? Evas? LCL? • The Angels' "inherent wave pattern [...] in terms of the arrangement and spacing [...] falls within a 99.89% match of human genes." This is further explained in the in-universe scientific paper "Crystalline DNA Theory." (Episode 05, 23) Speculation: How can Angels even have DNA, much less human DNA, if they are composed of photon analogues? Do they operate on some bizarre abstract level of physics? • An Angel's soul, according to the occult science of Metaphysical Biology, externalizes in the form of a luminescent crystalline sphere known as a Core. The Core contains a supply of blood analogue or LCL under high pressure as well as the S² Engine. Speculation: Crystalline composition of Core connected to "Crystalline DNA Theory?" Core composed of solidified LCL? • The Core contains a double helix-shaped organ known as a Super Solenoid Engine. The S² Engine is a power source that needs no fuel . It is involved in the manipulation of the "sea of Dirac." (Episode 16, 17) Speculation: S² Engine produces Zero-point energy? S² Engine connected to "Crystalline DNA Theory?" S² Engine is DNA analogue? • The Angel blood analogue is identical in appearance and operation to both human blood and LCL, kept under extremely high pressure within the body and Core, like the Evas. (Rebuild 1.0) Speculation: Angel/Eva blood is human blood? LCL? Heavily implied connection is present. • Breaking the Core causes an Angel's AT Field to collapse, which results in their physical form violently exploding and melting into blood analogue or LCL. (Rebuild 1.0) Speculation: Destruction of the Angel's soul? Energized LCL becomes exotic matter? LCL is exotic matter?

[]: Re: Angel "biology" notes/speculations             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Dec 03, 2010 2:00 pm Get the Rebuild stuff out of there, it should be pretty obvious by now that Angel biology doesn't work the same way as it did in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Fri Dec 03, 2010 2:49 pm I can't explain all of these, but I'll tell you what I know... Zenoseiya wrote: • Angels are composed of exotic matter, described as "light energy condensed into a solid state." It is not actually photons, but somehow similar. (NGE Proposal, Episode 05)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Dec 03, 2010 3:27 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Angels are made of PWM, or particle-wave matter: matter that acts as both particles and waves (hence, "light in a solid state").

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 03, 2010 3:34 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Dec 03, 2010 3:39 pm [quote=" Reichu":1n7scm7o][/quote:1n7scm7o] Not sure what I'm seeing here. Isn't the core down on the left there? Also, I love how you just had those pics on hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 03, 2010 4:04 pm I circled the core in the one where it's clearly visible (can tell it's the core based on positions of the orange thingies, plus the white fringe, plus... hell, just LOOK at him ), and then laid the circle on top of the other two screenshots (in which Zer's body hasn't moved). Before I did this exercise, however long ago, I didn't believe Zeruel kept the S2 in his core, but my mind changed pretty quick. [/tries vanishing again]

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Fri Dec 03, 2010 7:14 pm Azathoth wrote: All matter acts as both particles and waves.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Dec 03, 2010 8:06 pm Basically, we have cores, which contain an Angel's soul and it's S2 Engine/Fruit of Life, which is an infinite-energy machine. The rest of their body is basically pure energy condensed into a physical shape we can interact with and the Angels can basically shapeshift and do whatever the fuck they want. Lilin, by contrast, are a soul mixed with LCL, which is basically the primordial soup. The human soul shapes it into the familiar human body. But because we don't have that "infinite energy" thing, we can't shapeshift and do fuck-all to the universe's laws, and we pop like balloons if we take the soul out.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Dec 04, 2010 3:30 pm AuraTwilight wrote: The rest of their body is basically pure energy condensed into a physical shape we can interact with and the Angels can basically shapeshift and do whatever the fuck they want.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Dec 04, 2010 4:06 pm Not really. PWM's main property is that it maintains it's shape even when the soul leaves (destroying the core, which releases the soul, is the only way to kill an Angel). LCL entities like humans and animals and stuff need the soul inside at all times or they liquify.

[]:             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Sat Dec 04, 2010 8:05 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Angels are made of PWM, or particle-wave matter: matter that acts as both particles and waves (hence, "light in a solid state").

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Dec 04, 2010 8:57 pm Zenoseiya wrote: Rebuild heavily implies, if not outright states, the Angels are "made" of LCL. When their Cores/souls are broken, their ATF collapses, and their body turns into LCL, violently .

[]:             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Sat Dec 04, 2010 9:40 pm Azathoth wrote: This is one of many reasons why it is quite obvious that the same laws do not apply to Rebuild. And it isn't LCL, owing to LCL is orange and comes out of Lilith's vagina. Call it ACL if you like.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Dec 04, 2010 10:00 pm Please don't apply Rebuild to the main canon. It isn't part of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Zenoseiya » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:24 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Please don't apply Rebuild to the main canon. It isn't part of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:27 pm Then it should be in the Rebuild subforum, and take any evidence about the Angels' biology presented in NGE with a grain of salt, since they're rewriting the book.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 05, 2010 1:25 am Reichu wrote: Before I did this exercise, however long ago, I didn't believe Zeruel kept the S2 in his core, but my mind changed pretty quick.

[]:             Quote Post by Wil.E.Crazy » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:52 pm Only Lilin are made of LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Dec 05, 2010 4:55 pm It is the primordial soup of all LILITH-born life. The Angels come from Adam, who doesn't menstruate LCL out her vagina. LCL isn't orange. It looks and smells like human blood. This is made quite clear when the Entry Plug is filled with it. (Rebuild 1.0)
